BRICS Nations Buying Massive Amount of Gold Ahead of Plan To Dethrone US Dollar
articles.description: A group of economically-aligned nations are purchasing massive amounts of gold as they prepare to end their reliance on the U.S. dollar. According to a new report from U.S. Global Investors, the nations known collectively as BRICS are piling into the precious metal and will continue to be “huge buyers” of gold for the foreseeable […] The post BRICS Nations Buying Massive Amount of Gold Ahead of Plan To Dethrone US Dollar appeared first on The Daily Hodl.
